title: TLTV Shared Definitions
description: Reusable type definitions for TLTV protocol schemas.

channelId.description: Base58-encoded channel ID: 'TV' prefix + 44 base58 characters (2-byte version prefix 0x1433 + 32-byte Ed25519 public key).

base58Signature.description: Base58-encoded Ed25519 signature (64 bytes, encodes to 86-88 base58 characters).

timestampUTC.description: ISO 8601 timestamp in UTC with Z suffix. Second precision, no fractional seconds.

hostPort.description: Host and port: DNS hostname, IPv4 address, or bracketed IPv6 address, with required port.

message.description: Optional human-readable explanation. Clients MUST NOT parse this programmatically.
